center.name: 古埃及
center.summary: 古埃及是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括红胸黑雁，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | year = 1993 | title = Factors affecting the feeding distribution of Red-breasted Geese Branta ruficollis wintering in Romania | journal = Biological Conservation | volume = 63 | issue = 1 | pages = 61–65 | doi=10.1016/0006-3207(93)90074-b| bibcode = 1993BCons..63...61S }} Late Pleistocene remains of the species have been found in Bulgaria, and it is featured on ancient Egyptian paintings, including the famous Meidum Geese.{{cite journal | last1 = Rozenfeld | first1 = S
